title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Publication Quality Gates
rule: Do not present a release as current unless every automated gate passes, then verify live GitHub/HF mirrors after publishing.

automated_gates.title: Scope claims guard
automated_gates.blocks_if: Historical 32ep smoke/provenance strings are presented as real 32-episode metrics.
automated_gates.proves: The public narrative does not overclaim the Qwen3-Omni smoke artifacts.

automated_gates.title: Source alignment audit
automated_gates.blocks_if: Official full-dataset facts, sample-card facts, API-listing caveats, or public-card boundary markers are missing or inconsistent.
automated_gates.proves: The repo, website, and Hugging Face cards preserve the Xperience-10M source facts and current project boundary.

automated_gates.title: Website integrity
automated_gates.blocks_if: Local links, anchors, JSON bundles, or referenced image assets are missing or invalid.
automated_gates.proves: The GitHub Pages / HF static surface is internally coherent before upload.

automated_gates.title: Evaluation protocol
automated_gates.blocks_if: Windowing, split policy, leakage controls, task metrics, or unsupported interpretations are not explicit.
automated_gates.proves: The task evaluation protocol is generated from committed metric artifacts.

automated_gates.title: Quality-gate manifest
automated_gates.blocks_if: A public reviewer cannot see the current packaging gates in one place.
automated_gates.proves: The publication checklist is explicit, versioned, and mirrored with the repo.

automated_gates.title: Artifact index
automated_gates.blocks_if: Reviewer-critical evidence files are missing from the indexed proof layer.
automated_gates.proves: Core proof artifacts exist and stable files have SHA-256 hashes.

automated_gates.title: Publication hygiene
automated_gates.blocks_if: Raw data, caches, heavy archives, token strings, missing required assets, or stale public-card figure references enter public bundles.
automated_gates.proves: The repo and prepared HF bundles are clean enough to publish.

automated_gates.title: Prepared mirror parity
automated_gates.blocks_if: Prepared HF Space, artifact dataset, or model bundle diverges from the repo for critical files.
automated_gates.proves: The files staged for GitHub and Hugging Face are synchronized before upload.

post_publish_checks.title: Live publication verifier
post_publish_checks.required_result: live GitHub Pages, GitHub raw, HF Space, artifact dataset, and model mirrors match the current release assets

post_publish_checks.title: Rendered browser smoke
post_publish_checks.evidence: Browser/Playwright page identity, nonblank render, console health, and one local interaction
post_publish_checks.required_result: no relevant console warnings/errors and target links work

scope_boundary: These gates validate public packaging, claim boundaries, mirror parity, and website integrity. They do not prove cross-episode model quality.
